rulings.Case Title: TESHOME T TAREKEGN, VS. FREWWORK ABERRA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Reconsider And For Leave To Amend Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 2, 2014, Line 1: PLAINTIFF TESHOME TAREKEGN'S Motion To Reconsider And For Leave To Amend Second Amended Complaint: Continued to October 14, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Department 501 to be heard by the Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than October 3, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MAYO et al VS. CADELINIA & LEUNG, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 2, 2014, Line 2: CROSS DEFENDANT AUSTIN BOSARGE'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT: Sustained with leave to amend to allege in good faith that Bosarge was representing Faulkner and Less as (1) counsel and (2) real estate broker for the transaction at issue; and to allege which services/actions/inactions have been performed in each capacity. (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: DENISE BATTISTA VS. NORTHPOINT LAND LLC
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 2, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANTS WILSEY MANAGEMENT and NP APARTMENTS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: Continued to October 23, 2104 at 9:30 AM in Department 501. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than October 8, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: TANYA LLANES-TARVER VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 2, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT PENNYMAC LOAN SERVICES's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege in good faith a viable cause of action against the moving defendant in light of Keshtgar v. U.S. Bank (2014) 226 Cal.App.4th 1201 and Fontenot v. Wells Fargo (2011) 198 Cal.App.4th 256. Plaintiff must allege tender. (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: LUCILLE TOM VS. JOSEPH L. ALIOTO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-14-649816 WITH CASE CUD-14-648781
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 2, 2014, Line 5: PLAINTIFF LUCILLE TOM'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTION CUD-14-649816 WITH ACTION CUD-14-648781: GRANTED. The cases are consolidated for all purposes. CUD-14-648781 shall be the lead action. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. (501/PHA)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES F. BLANDING VS. ERNIE HARTS STANSBERRY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 2, 2014, Line 6: DEFENDANT ERNIE STANSBERRY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT and DEFAULT JUDGMENT and for LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall file answer forthwith. (501/PHA)
